intro.speaker: Narrator
intro.text: The tunnel opens into a vaulted gallery. Strange machines crouch in the dark, gnawing at veins of pale crystal — and a voice trembles out of the gloom as the miners notice you.

d1.speaker: Duergar
d1.text: Oi! What are you doing here? This ain't the kind of place to be sniffing around...

m1.speaker: Maren
m1.text: Are you the source of all this noise? We've been sent to investigate.

d2.speaker: Duergar
d2.text: The hell we are. Is it bothering you? We didn't know we had neighbours.

point.speaker: Narrator
point.text: These are Duergars — a folk most believe died out an age ago. Do you point it out?

choices.label: Mention that you thought they were extinct
Ignore that they're Duergars and act normally

x_extinct.speaker: Maren
x_extinct.text: You're Duergars? Weren't you supposed to be extinct?!

react_extinct.speaker: Narrator
react_extinct.text: They take a step forward, hands tightening on their tools.

combat_intro.speaker: Narrator
combat_intro.text: The Duergars drop their picks for heavier iron. There will be no more talking.

de1.speaker: Maren
de1.text: I'm sorry — I'm just excited. I've read so much about you! What are you all doing with this machinery? It's like nothing I've ever seen.

de2.speaker: Duergar
de2.text: You see these crystals? With them we can build a vehicle like the world's never seen — carry it all the way to the Crystalmen's hold out in the desert. (PLACEHOLDER) So. Are you with us, or against us?

de3.speaker: Maren
de3.text: That sounds remarkable. But is there truly no other way? Your noise has driven the Quartz-Mother from her nest — I counted a dozen bodies on my way in.

de4.speaker: Duergar
de4.text: This is the fastest way. That's not our problem.

de5.speaker: Maren
de5.text: All right. How many of these crystals do you need?

de6.speaker: Duergar
de6.text: All of them. So sod off.

join_branch.speaker: Narrator
join_branch.text: You wonder whether you could talk them into hunting the Quartz-Mother with you.

choices.label: Ask them to join you in killing the Quartz-Mother
Maybe it's not the right time

join_refuse.speaker: Duergar
join_refuse.text: Are you mad? We're not walking blind into those tunnels to fight the deadliest thing in the Deepmark. We don't even know where she is!

join_refuse2.speaker: Maren
join_refuse2.text: (to herself) Maybe I can convince them if I learn a little more first...

ig1.speaker: Maren
ig1.text: You're doing real harm to the ecosystem down here. We found at least a dozen bodies on the way in.

ig2.speaker: Duergar
ig2.text: I fail to see how that's our concern.

ig3.speaker: Maren
ig3.text: What happens when the Quartz-Mother comes back to her nest? Wouldn't that be your concern?

ig4.speaker: Duergar
ig4.text: We'll be long gone by then. Doesn't take long to mine out a seam.

ig5.speaker: Maren
ig5.text: All right. Is there any way we could help you do it faster?

ig6.speaker: Duergar
ig6.text: Of course! Grab a pickaxe and mine whatever crystals you find in the caves. Sooner we hit our tally, sooner we're gone. And let us know if you turn up any other nests.

ig_inner.speaker: Maren
ig_inner.text: (to herself) We'll still be in danger the whole time they're digging...

choices.label: Ask them to help you bring down the Quartz-Mother

ig_collab.speaker: Maren
ig_collab.text: That works. I'll keep an eye out for crystals. And — what if we brought down the Quartz-Mother together? She carries a dozen of these on her hide. It'd make us both happy.

ig_collab2.speaker: Duergar
ig_collab2.text: Hmm. (The Duergars glance at one another.)

ig_collab3.speaker: Duergar
ig_collab3.text: We'll think on it. Come back with some crystals — and with where she dens. Our captain will be here next you visit; you can put it to him then.
